title: 3 High-Yield Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
text: High-yield dividend stocks offer relatively high dividend yields compared to the average dividend stock. Generally, I view a high-yield dividend to be above the 4-5% range.

title: Crown Castle to Present at the Morgan Stanley 2023 Technology, Media & Telecom Conference
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") announced today that Dan Schlanger, Crown Castle's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to present on Thursday, March 9, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time at the Morgan Stanley 2023 Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. Mr. Schlanger's presentation will be broadcast live over the Internet and is expected to last approximately 30 minutes. The live audio webcast link and presentation for the conference will be available on Crown Castle's website at www.crowncastle.com, where it will also be archived for replay.

title: Nicholas Ward's Dividend Growth Portfolio: January 2023 Review
text: My dividend income rose by 9.56% on a y/y basis during January. My portfolio's value rose by approximately 6.9%.

title: Crown Castle to Present at Raymond James' 44th Annual Institutional Investors Conference
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") announced today that Dan Schlanger, Crown Castle's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to present on Tuesday, March 7, 2023 at 11:00 a.m. ET at the Raymond James' 44th Annual Institutional Investors Conference. Mr. Schlanger's presentation will be broadcast live over the Internet and is expected to last approximately 30 minutes. The live audio webcast link and presentation for the conference will be available on Crown Castle's website at www.crowncastle.com, where it will also be archived for replay.

title: Crown Castle: A Great Mix Of Current Yield And Dividend Growth
text: Crown Castle recently released solid Q4 results. The company continues to build out its 5G footprint here in the US. The REIT has been investing in small cells and fiber to do this.

title: Crown Castle: Excellent Opportunity To Buy This Moat-Worthy REIT
text: Crown Castle has a very strong asset base that connects every major U.S. market. It's demonstrating strong fundamentals and has plenty of opportunities for growth.

title: American Tower Is Well Positioned To Grow, But Crown Castle Could Keep Up
text: Demand for wireless services is expected to grow by 20% per year until 2027, fuelled by increased data usage and increasing availability of lower cost phones in emerging markets. Cell tower providers will be the first ones to benefit from this trend. Both AMT and CCI are very well positioned to take advantage of this uptrend.

title: REIT Earnings Halftime Report
text: We're approaching the halfway point of another consequential real estate earnings season with roughly 40 equity REITs and 15 mortgage REITs representing 50% of the total market capitalization reporting results. Results thus far have modestly exceeded expectations. Of the 36 REITs that provide guidance, 20 (56%) reported 2022 Funds From Operations ("FFO") above their prior guidance while 3 (8%) missed.

title: 3 Best REITs To Buy For A Recession
text: Economic storm clouds are gathering. Three reliable indicators are pointing to a coming recession this year.

title: What Me Worry? I'm Buying 2 Big Infrastructure Yields
text: Buying moat-worthy high yielding stocks is a better way than trying to pinch pennies all the time. Owning EPD and CCI offers immediate diversification to a broad array moat-worth infrastructure assets.

title: 3 Stocks Down 25% or More to Buy for Decades of Passive Income
text: These high-yield dividend stocks are down today, but that likely won't last long.
